title: ウマ娘ちゃんクイズ☆～関係性編～

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
It's Umamusume quiz time! Our questions will
cover everything from histories to hobbies. Are
you ready to be tested on your Horsegirl knowledge?
choice_data_list: What's this all of a sudden?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Our love of Umamusume is the number one thing
the two of us have in common, right?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Yet, I'm the only one who ever shares my
thoughts! I never see you nerd out... like ever.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Then I realized why. It's because...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I can be a little much, right?! It must be hard for
you to pitch in when I'm being so loud all the
time!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: If so, then know that I'm so sorry! I want you to be able to express your joy when you feel like it too!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
So, if possible, I wanna know all about what you
look for in your oshis! I wanna simp over them
with you! We shouldn't keep our passions to
ourselves! We have to share!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
That's when I came up with the idea that an
Umamusume quiz might help loosen up your
tongue!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
This isn't about finding out who's the best or
anything like that! It's about sharing! Think of it
like one of those Umatter updates they do
sometimes!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In other words, she's manufacturing an
opportunity for us to have a fun discussion about
Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
So, are you ready?! Let's get started! In three,
two, one!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Ta-dah! This one is multiple choice!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Everyone knows Smart Falcon, the Umadol who
makes everyone's daily life shine! But do you
know her roommate?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Is it Eishin Flash, the Umamusume who keeps a cool front but always cracks a smile at the end? Orrr... is it Mihono Bourbon, the poker-faced powerhouse with the purest heart?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Okay, Trainer! Let your explosive love for
Umamusume ignite!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Woohooo! That... is... CORRECT!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
That shy smile Flash shows when she looks at
Falco was developed intimately within the
confines of their shared dorm room!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Splendid work, Trainer! You're doing us Horsegirl
simps proud!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
All right, hold onto that energy, 'cause now I
wanna move onto oshi talk!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Who are you simping for recently? Ah, wait... that
sounds a little disrespectful to the oshis you've
been simping for up until now.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Which also can't be right... right? We love all our
oshis equally—it's just, sometimes, certain ones
take the spotlight partly 'cause of their sparkle...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As a result of the sudden quiz, Agnes Digital
begins rambling away at jaw-dropping speed.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Ohhhh! Too bad! Sorry to say, but that is incorrect.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: That's okay, though! We all make mistakes!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
What's important is what you do after! So,
remember what happened here when you go
home today, m'kay! And then, you can dip your
toe back into hardcore simping!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Looks like I'll have to up my Horsegirl knowledge if I
want to try and keep up with Agnes Digital.
